name: boot_time
description: Analyze boot time: systemd blame, critical chain, and boot duration
command: echo '=== Boot Analysis ===' && echo "Last boot: $(who -b | awk '{print $3, $4}')" && echo "Uptime: $(uptime -p)" && echo '' && echo '--- Slowest Services (blame) ---' && systemd-analyze blame 2>/dev/null | head -15 && echo '' && echo '--- Critical Chain ---' && systemd-analyze critical-chain --no-pager 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '' && echo '--- Boot Time ---' && systemd-analyze 2>/dev/null
